body_txt: An omnipresent meta-trope about female sexuality. Sexually active men have often been admired for their virility and sexual conquests (unless he is a cad, or picking only low hanging fruit ). note This has, however, also dueled with an appreciation for male chastity. Culture in Ming Dynasty China , for instance, held that a man was manly either by being a chaste warrior or an incredibly promiscuous and scholarly/cultured pretty-boy . One's life expectancy was supposed to be shorter in the latter category, in part because of the speculation that male ejaculation entailed transferring some of one's finite store of (male) life force to the receiver (which is why male masturbation was avoided by anyone with good sense), but largely because of all the jealous lovers and husbands, not to mention STIs . A promiscuous woman on the other hand is more likely to be seen as a slut. This means that the leading lady in this trope is likely be in a monogamous meaningful relationship with the leading man. Anyone knocking the chastity of the hero's girl is even more likely to get punched out than someone calling the hero a virgin . Sometimes The Hero is a womanizer at the same time, but his best girl will still wait for him . This is why Nature Adores a Virgin . Very often the story ends with love making the man seek a monogamous relationship with the woman, seeing the error of his womanizing ways. Compare No Guy Wants to Be Chased , Best Her to Bed Her , Defiled Forever , Emasculated Cuckold , Madonna-Whore Complex , Nature Adores a Virgin , Slut-Shaming . Contrast The Unfair Sex , My Girl Is a Slut , Good Bad Girl , and Free-Love Future . Subtrope of Men Act, Women Are .
